name: Cloudinary
description: Monitor Cloudinary media management for asset security and API access compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Cloudinary at https://cloudinary.com/console
2. Go to Settings → Access Keys
3. Copy your API Key and API Secret
4. Base64 encode 'api_key:api_secret'
5. Enter your cloud name and encoded credentials below

credentialFields.label: Cloud Name
credentialFields.helpText: Your Cloudinary cloud name (found in Dashboard)

credentialFields.label: Encoded API Credentials
credentialFields.helpText: Base64 encode 'api_key:api_secret'. Found in Cloudinary Dashboard → Settings → Access Keys. Command: echo -n 'api_key:api_secret' | base64

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Reviews Cloudinary media usage and storage for asset infrastructure inventory

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Cloudinary sub-accounts and access keys for media access management
